notes: Restricts incident approval and rejection to the configured incident approver when an approver is set, even if the assignee has admin-level platform access.
Keeps admin/executive fallback only for legacy incidents without a configured approver.
Aligns the incident detail UI so approve/reject buttons stay disabled unless the signed-in user is the configured approver.
Keeps the 1.0.53 incident close guard and SCADA admin configuration unchanged.
Adds regression coverage for assignee-admin approval and rejection bypass prevention.
